tweets.full_text:
You can now enable Claude to use your computer to complete tasks.

It opens your apps, navigates your browser, fills in spreadsheets—anything you'd do sitting at your desk.

Research preview in Claude Cowork and Claude Code, macOS only. https://t.co/sVymgmtEMI
tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic发布新功能：现在可以让Claude控制你的电脑来完成任务，包括打开应用、浏览网页、编写代码等。

tweets.full_text: Claude is helping me organize my whole music career and other businesses  in days ... and it's moving my business forward at a high rate! Some tech youngbull I met on LinkedIn gave me a incredible template! Who else can help me with Claude
tweets.summary_zh: 说唱歌手Meek Mill表示Claude正在帮他整理整个音乐事业和其他商业项目，效率极高。

tweets.full_text: BREAKING: NVIDIA CEO announces “we’ve achieved AGI”
tweets.summary_zh: 重磅：NVIDIA CEO黄仁勋宣布'我们已经实现了AGI（通用人工智能）'

tweets.full_text: A lot of software is about to get a lot better, right before it becomes unnecessary.
tweets.summary_zh: 大量软件即将变得更好，然后在它变得不再必要之前。暗示AI将取代很多软件。

tweets.full_text: finally snapped and called my claude the n word and he has legitimately never produced better code than just now
tweets.summary_zh: 用户对Claude说了脏话后，Claude表现得前所未有的专业和高效，引发关于AI性格的讨论。

tweets.full_text:
Today, we’re releasing a feature that allows Claude to control your computer: Mouse, keyboard, and screen, giving it the ability to use any app.

I believe this is especially useful if used with Dispatch, which allows you to remotely control Claude on your computer while you’re https://t.co/tthl6vpID2
tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic今天发布Claude电脑控制功能：Mouse Control，允许Claude直接操控你的电脑。

tweets.full_text: Le instalé claude code a mi PC de escritorio y le di acceso absoluto para que pase toda la noche intentando optimizarla porque está muy lenta, mañana les cuento si reventó todo a la mierda o sirvió de algo.
tweets.summary_zh: 在台式电脑上安装了Claude Code并给予完全访问权限，让它自由发挥。

tweets.full_text:
OpenClaw 2026.3.22 🦞

🏪 ClawHub plugin marketplace
🤖 MiniMax M2.7, GPT-5.4-mini/nano + per-agent reasoning

🌐 Exa, Tavily, Firecrawl search

This release is so big it needs its own table of contents. https://t.co/XvRbXEduGC

tweets.full_text:
Cursor can now search millions of files and find results in milliseconds.

This dramatically speeds up how fast agents complete tasks.

We're sharing how we built Instant Grep, including the algorithms and tradeoffs behind the design. https://t.co/uzqMUgHvYn

tweets.full_text:
Elon rolls out the Optimus program. The first real humanoid robot.

People go, “Okay… and what exactly do I do with that?”

Seriously? Walk the dog. Watch the kids. Help your parents. Carry groceries. Clean up. Handle 
the stuff you keep postponing.

It’s your own C-3PO and https://t.co/XpVXg9pI8c

tweets.full_text:
The working style of OpenClaw founder @steipete is insane.

bro runs 4–10 AI coding agents in parallel to generate, review, and commit code at superhuman speed.    

hitting 500+ commits pretty much every day and did 6,600+ in jan month alone.    

NVIDIA CEO must be happy seeing https://t.co/boYJtCy9UE

tweets.full_text: pasó con chatgpt, pasa con gemini. hay alguna ia que no se boludice con el paso del tiempo?
tweets.summary_zh: ChatGPT经历过的问题现在Gemini也在经历——AI助手随着时间推移变得更差。

tweets.full_text:
Someone asked what advice founders ignore. That they:

1. Should change their name.

2. Should launch fast.

3. Shouldn't treat fundraising as success.

4. Shouldn't assume they can raise because it's time to.

5. Should fire bad people quickly.

6. Shouldn't talk to acquirers.
tweets.summary_zh: YC创始人Paul Graham分享被创业者忽视的建议：应该改名、招联合创始人等。

tweets.full_text:
Today we are launching the Kapso CLI:

WhatsApp numbers for agents.

1️⃣ npm install -g @kapso/cli
2️⃣ kapso setup

Done, your agent has a WhatsApp number. https://t.co/sl6EKwOdi6

tweets.full_text:

We use these internally to automatically resolve CI failures, push doc updates, and generally power automations that you want to exists beyond a closed laptop https://t.co/uuDesRzSrg

tweets.full_text:
Be careful what you post anonymously. New research shows AI can find who you are solely from your posts.

It's rare to see ~500x research improvements, but they went from mapping <0.1% to 54% of HackerNews profiles to their LinkedIn. 

It's so over, u/throwaway4927. https://t.co/Ep8Gz7muRb
tweets.summary_zh: 注意匿名发帖安全：新研究表明AI可以通过写作风格识别出你的真实身份。

tweets.full_text:
There are 6 levels of making Claude Code run autonomously, and most people are stuck on Level 1.

Level 1: Kill the permission prompts. Run claude --dangerously-skip-permissions. One flag. Now it stops asking “Can I edit this file?” every 30 seconds while you’re checking Slack.
tweets.summary_zh: Claude Code自主运行有6个层级，大多数人还停留在初级阶段。
